name: Fragrant Peppercorn Tofu (Yan)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound lean ground chicken (or substitute pork or beef)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the marinade ingredients in a bowl. Add the chicken and mix well. Let stand for 10 minutes.
2. Cut the tofu into 1/2 inch cubes. Combine the sauce ingredients in a bowl; set aside.
3. Place a wok over high heat until hot. Add oil, swirling to coat sides. Add garlic and cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 10 seconds.
4. Add meat and stir-fry for 2 minutes. Add tofu and sauce. Cook, stirring gently, until tofu is heated through and sauce boils and thickens.
5. Place in a serving bowl and garnish with green onions.
